ab: Maqtu caak isu’uan simul is cuii?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: Maqtu na! pai’un su’u simul ca cuii?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: Minpungul caak madas is cuii, Maqtu caak isu’uan simul is cuii?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: Nii caak amin madas is cuii ki!
en: B: I don't have any money either!

ab: Minpungul caak madas is cuii, Maqtu caak isu’uan simul is cuii?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: Nii, ni’ang asu macoqais is cuii sinimulan suu tangus a.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven't paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: Maqtu caak simul is huluc suu?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: Maqtu, anaka’ asu siza’.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: Maqtu caak simul is haqail suu?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: Ispasimulin zaku kaut ta.
en: B: I lent it to kaut.

ab: Pasimulin azak i laili’paqaqais suu qa’?
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: Macial, utu coqaisi zaku’an ca laqbingin.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: Qudananin, nii azak madas is talulung, pasimuling is talulung?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It's raining, I don't have an umbrella, can you lend me one?

ab: Mu’haz ta’a ca talulung naak ,mukun ata talulungan a.
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let's stick together!

ab: Sinimul naak tu tangusang a haqail dii, coqaisun zaku haan su’uan.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: Ma’az tu haqail ca asaunang su’u sadu ka taqu’i caak.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: Nalakua azak macoqais is cuii haan su’uan?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: Nitu makua, maca maizin is cui suu a, tudiipin pabazbaz.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It doesn't matter, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: Lakua asu macoqais is cuii zakuan?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: Coqaisun zaku su’uan ca laqbingin.
en: A: I'll return it to you tomorrow.

ab: Lakua asu macoqais is haqail zaku’an?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: Nitu coqaisunin zaku haan su’uan taqna?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn't I return it to you yesterday?

ab: Nitu icia Bazai ca ispapatas dii ispasimul su’uan?
en: A: Did Bazai lend you this pen?

ab: Uu, sinimul naak haip han diip.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: Sinimul suu han Bazai ca ispapatas dii?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Bazai?

ab: Nii, sinbaliv tina naak ca dii.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: Uka’in qacila ki, mucan a Puni simul tukuc is qacila.
en: A: We are out of salt, let's borrow some from Puni.

ab: Uu, namaipata azak simul.
en: B: Okay, I'll borrow it.

ab: Tupa’i ca Puni tu coqaisiving ca cuii zaku’an.
en: B: Go tell Puni to give me my money back.

ab: Piia cuii ca sinimulan cia haan su’uan?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
